generated_oml:
namespace base = "http://www.omg.org/techprocess/abm/OML"
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.org/DTDFVocab"

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder on motor drive providing current, position, velocity, and acceleration data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData JointSensorDataStream
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox providing current, position, velocity, and acceleration data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData JointSensorDataStream
]

instance JointSensorDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance SimulinkSimulationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation of motor, gearwheel, and gearbox behavior",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of robot joint",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for traceability",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTDataStreaming : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance SINUMERIK840DController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for machine control",
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for unified monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition and Internal Block Diagrams for structural modeling of robot joint",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance MotorSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink simulation model for motor behavior",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance GearwheelSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink simulation model for gearwheel behavior",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance GearboxSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink simulation model for gearbox behavior",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Coulomb-Viscous friction model for joint dynamics",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Stribeck friction model for joint dynamics",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Dahl friction model for joint dynamics",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box LuGre friction model for joint dynamics",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance BlackBoxFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Black-box data-driven model for friction dynamics",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current data from robot joint sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData JointSensorDataStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor and secondary encoders",
    DTDFVocab:fromData JointSensorDataStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance VelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Velocity data derived from encoder measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData JointSensorDataStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Acceleration data derived from encoder measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData JointSensorDataStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque data calculated from current measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData JointSensorDataStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity data derived from position measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData JointSensorDataStream,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance FrictionDynamicsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into joint friction dynamics for updating control parameters"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot joint data for monitoring"
]

instance UpdateControlParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of robot control parameters based on friction insights",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models",
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionDynamicsInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for enhancing motion accuracy through friction model updates",
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateControlParametersAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization via unified dashboard",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance RobotFirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot for joint friction analysis"
]

instance DigitalShadowEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains RobotFirstAxis, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, SysMLModelingTool, SimulinkSimulationTool, AssetAdministrationShell, MQTTDataStreaming, SINUMERIK840DController, DashboardVisualizationTool
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction exists as the digital shadow functions as a passive entity with one-way data flow from physical to virtual and does not push data back to the physical system [32]."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time processing of live sensor data for continuous friction model identification during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of SysML structural models, Simulink simulation models, live sensor data via MQTT, Asset Administration Shells (AAS), and a unified dashboard for visualization, forming a passive digital shadow for friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), capturing real-time data during robot operation for continuous friction model refinement."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated versus measured data, traceability of data generation processes, and multi-physics-aware identification to ensure model accuracy and reliability."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming between physical sensors and digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards and SysML for modeling and traceability."
]
